title: Quantum KKL-type Inequalities Revisited
summary: In the present paper, we develop the random restriction method in the quantum framework. By applying this method, we establish the quantum Eldan-Gross inequality, the quantum Talagrand isoperimetric inequality, and related quantum KKL-type inequalities. Our results recover some recent results of Rouzé et al. \cite{RWZ2024} and Jiao et al. \cite{JLZ2025}, which can be viewed as alternative answers to the quantum KKL conjecture proposed by Motanaro and Osborne in \cite{MO2010}.
